kind: algorithmic complexity-class replacement (O(n log n) -> O(n)) for F32 sort/argsort
lever_summary: F32 (Literal-backed, no dense storage) fell to the generic O(n log n) comparison sort. New sort_along_axis_f32_radix keys by f64_total_order_key(literal.as_f64()) and LSD-radix sorts in O(n); triggers for F32 ascending with axis_dim>=256.
method: same-bench A/B; baseline = stashed generic comparison sort; normalized by eval/sort_calib_reduce_64k_i64 (ReduceSum, unaffected) calibration.

change.lever: Added sort_along_axis_f32_radix; sort_along_axis routes F32 ascending to it (after the F64 dense path). Added eval/sort_64k_f32 bench + radix_sort_f32_ascending_matches_total_cmp_reference test.

isomorphism.type: BIT-IDENTICAL output permutation to the generic comparison path (both stable; f64_total_order_key reproduces f64::total_cmp on as_f64); sort emits reordered original F32 literals, argsort same i64 indices

validation.name: sort_tests
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --release sort

validation.name: clippy
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --release --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

note: Generalizes trivially to BF16/F16 (same SortKey::Float(as_f64) path) and U32/U64/I32 keys — filed as follow-on.
